name: South West Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 can Italian plum tomatoes, drained & chopped (28 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Rinse and drain beans. Place in an oven-safe casserole dish.
3. Add remaining ingredients, folding gently so beans don't break up.
4. Bake, covered for 45 minutes. Remove cover; stir and bake, uncovered,
for another 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Serves 8-10.
